en: Most companies in Austria are required to register with the Austrian Business Register (Firmenbuch).
Is your company registered on the Business Register (Firmenbuch)?
Please provide your company's registration number (Firmenbuchnummer).
The UID (Umsatzsteuer-Identifikationsnummer) number is the local name of the Value-Added Tax (VAT) number.
Does your company have a UID number?
Please provide your company's UID number.
Please indicate your company's business entity / form of business within this country.
